problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
